title: Fit For The Job 4 inch Block Brush, Masonry Brush for Rapid Painting with Smooth & Textured Masonry Paints on Brick, Breeze Block, Render, Pebbledash & More, Large Paintbrush
features: FAST & EFFICIENT PAINTING: this block paint brush is all about getting the job done quickly, featuring a high capacity head that loads up plenty of paint each time for rapid painting with minimum effort
FOR ALL MASONRY PAINTS: this masonry paint brush is suitable for smooth and textured masonry paints, giving excellent coverage and minimising the number of coats you need to apply

IDEAL FOR ROUGH SURFACES: made from durable 100% synthetic material, the brick paint brush has deep bristles that are ideal for getting into textured surfaces including brick, breeze block, cement, pebbledash, heavily textured render and stucco (exterior cement plaster) Masonry brushes for painting walls

COMFORTABLE TO USE: the handle features soft grip for comfortable working, so it's kinder to your hands as they'll suffer less wear and tear and won't blister Carefully shaped to fit neatly into your hand whether you hold the brush with a palm grip or a closed fist grip, it features a ribbed thumb area, giving you plenty of purchase so the brush won't slip and slide about
EASY CLEAN: the synthetic filaments are easy to clean in warm water after use and hold their shape time after time ready for next use, ensuring your brush will last for many painting jobs
COMPATIBLE WITH POLES: the handle features a push fitting for extension poles - ideal if you're covering large areas or need to extend your reach without using a ladders or platform
description: From the manufacturer Fit For The Job is the UK's widest range of DIY decorating tools and accessories - from preparation to application we've got everything you need for a perfect finish. Preparation, protection and painting - Fit For The Job is your one stop decorating accessories solution. Paint & Varnish Brushes Whether it's emulsion, eggshell, gloss or satin on walls, woodwork or metal, we've got a brush to suit every paint, every surface - and every budget - for a finish you'll be proud of. Exterior Brushes With a range of specialist flat brushes and block brushes, Fit For The Job can help you paint all types of masonry surface including brick, breeze block, render and pebbledash, as well as painting or staining fences, sheds, decking and garden furniture. Emulsion Rollers Our emulsion rollers enable you to cover walls and ceilings at speed, plus we've got a handy no-edge corner roller that saves you cutting in with a brush. Mini Rollers Mini rollers cover faster than brushes and as well as emulsion mini rollers for walls and ceilings, we've got foam rollers for gloss and satin on flat areas of wood and metal like window sills, skirting board, panel doors and garage doors. Decorating Tools Fit For The Job has scraping and filling knives to help you get your surface in tiptop condition before painting. Plus we've got decorating shields to help you get sharp paint edges, as well as handy wallpapering tools to help you achieve perfect straight lines and invisible seams. Dust Sheets Our range of cost-effective, fully recyclable polythene dust sheets keeps floors and furniture protected from spills and splashes during the job, ensuring that paint only goes where you want it to. Abrasives A great finish starts with great preparation, and Fit For The Job's abrasives range includes high quality sandpaper, wet & dry, flexible sanding pads that are ideal for curved surfaces, plus wire brushes and steel wool for cleaning. Decorating Workwear Fit For The Job has a range of decorating workwear, including trousers, shorts, the classic decorator's bib & brace and a painter's apron. Each is carefully designed and tailored for a comfortable fit, with storage pockets to keep essential tools close at hand.
